PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-03-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:

Jordan Sussman, Esq., via Zoom, for Tom Archbald, Executor.

At the court's query, counsel offers the court a status on the securities held with the controller. Counsel requests a continuance to June of this year. The court advises counsel that it is inclined to take the instant petition off calendar and set a new status hearing on close of the estate. No objection to the court's tentative ruling is presented.

The subject matter is taken off calendar. A Status on Close of the Estate is set for Jun-10-2024 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross. C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Petrucci. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-10-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Feb-06-2023 Continued To Jul-10-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jordan Sussman appeared by zoom for Tom Archibald (executor).

The court questions why the Probate Examiner's notes from five months ago have not been cleared. Mr. Sussman stated that they are still waiting on the final act of recovery from the State of California, that the State will not review the matter until April, and that the property at issue are securities in the amount of $200,000.00 to $250,000.00. Mr. Sussman also stated that the company they are working with has put in an application with the State, that there is quite a backlog and requested a four to five-month continuance. In addition, Mr. Sussman stated that he will get an inventory and appraisal in, that he will clear up all of the examiner's notes and that he will file an amended petition. The Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Account, etc. is continued to July 10, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The court informed Mr. Sussman that if the amended petition is not filed by that date, the current petition will go off calendar and he will be required to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jordan Sussman, via Zoom, for Tom Archbald, Executor.

Counsel reports of a Petition for Final Distribution that is pending in the court's e-filing queue and confirms the assets listed within the petition. Counsel advises of additional assets which the Executor plans to recover via an omnibus clause.

After additional discussion, the matter is continued to Jun-14-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-29-2022 Continued To May-24-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jordan Sussman, via zoom, for Tom Archbald, Executor.

The court queries counsel regarding the status of this matter. Counsel reports that after several attempts at obtaining an accountant he has recently able to hire one who will be assisting him with the accounting and asks for a continuance.

After additional assistance, the court grants counsel's request for a continuance to May-24-2022 at 9:00am in Dept. 204. A Status of Administration is set for the same date. Counsel is instructed to file either a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration by May-10-2022 or the court will suspend the Executor.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Cristobal. Not reported.

Mr. Sussman reports that he missed the previous calling of this matter due to COVID related issues. Mr. Sussman advises that he intends to file a Petition for Final Distribution. The court takes the Order to Show Cause and Order to Appear off calendar.

After additional discussion, the Status on Close of Estate is continued to Mar-29-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Off Calendar Dec-14-2021 Continued To Jan-11-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Personal Representative Tom Archbald and Attorney Jordan Sussman to appear on Jan-11-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. An Order to Show Cause will be issued as to why the court should not impose sanctions of $500 on Personal Representative Donald White and Attorney Jordan Sussman and is set for Jan-11-2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Department 204. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-25-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-28-2019 Continued To Jun-25-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jordan Sussman for Executor.

The Court stated that it is looking for a petition for final distribution. Mr. Sussman stated that he still needs some time, that they just got the final inventory for assets that they recovered and that there are some tax issues. The Court informed Counsel that he should have filed a status report. Status on close of estate is continued to June 25, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Mr. Sussman that either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has to be filed by that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-27-2019 Continued To May-28-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Jordan Sussman for Tom Archbald.

Mr. Sussman requested a 60 to 90-day continuance stating that they have previously distributed over 95% of the assets, that there is $100,000.00 on reserve and that the inventory has been sent to Executor for signature. Status on close of estate is continued to May 28, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-12-2017 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing Re Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-14-2017 Continued To Jul-12-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jordan Sussman for petitioner Donald White

Mr. Sussman reported that the bulk of the securities have been distributed, but that additional assets of the estate have been discovered which need to be liquidated. He requested a six month continuance. The Court expressed concern regarding such a lengthy delay without the filing of a report of status, and inquired if the estate could be wrapped up in a shorter period. Mr. Sussman responded that he thought the six month period would be necessary. The Court set the matter over for a Report of Status hearing on July 12, 2017, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)
